title: 60fps, non-blocking pipeline, and 30-minute soak gate
blocker_detail: 30-minute soak requires Supertonic model loaded and running; no model access available. Additionally depends on SUPERTONIC-03 and SUPERTONIC-04 measurements. No soak artifacts were generated. All telemetry is null — not fabricated.

deferred_test_cases.description: Single and dual mode under idle/Google/Supertonic load

deferred_test_cases.reason: No model loaded; hardware soak infrastructure only

deferred_test_cases.description: Local STT + local MT + Supertonic combined load
Network disabled after model install — no silent cloud

resolution_path.estimated_effort: 1 day (soak run) + 1 day (verification) once prerequisites met

notes: This is the final performance gate before SUPERTONIC-11 default-readiness ADR. Cannot be executed until the full SUPERTONIC stack is functional.
